understanding.goal_understanding: Progress through each KA59 level by moving the selectable piece(s) so that every goal tile marked '+' is occupied by a selectable simultaneously; if there are multiple goals, all must be covered at the same time to trigger WIN and ultimately complete the whole run.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions shift only the currently selected piece one grid cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction unless blocked by walls/bounds; if a pushable object is immediately adjacent in the move direction, it can be pushed along with the selected piece. Levels can contain multiple selectables, and control is switched by CLICKing a selectable’s exact pixel/grid position (same coordinate system as player.position/objects); the semantic_grid uses P for the selected piece, S for other selectables, B for blocks, # for walls, + for goals, and movement_*_blocked is only a heuristic hint and may not perfectly predict whether a move will succeed.
